final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining the aesthetic of 大话西游 in a 90s 港片 style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic with 胶片颗粒 — exact grain level and film stock treatment is yours
Composition: must include a foreground couple embracing against a city wall, two figures standing in the distant background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting evoking the world of 大话西游
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, romantically charged atmosphere with period 港片 drama — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded 90s film direction — exact hues and saturation are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 胶片颗粒 surface treatment — exact grain weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
